title: Origins SMP
description: Origins SMP, but with some extra fun because it just felt right. Same chaos with your mates, plus new mods and surprises you haven’t seen before. Inspired by creators like TommyInnit, Tubbo, Smajor, Shubble, Ranboo, Jschlatt, Nihachu, and more!
body:
[![Origins Big Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fPaa752e/images/d20b08d2be39fecd6545d8a5e02ae3662b13116c.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins)

This modpack started out so viewers could play with the same mods as the original Origins SMP. After the SMP wrapped up, it grew into something new, keeping the core feel but with a refined, expanded modlist.

It’s been rebuilt by carefully watching **TommyInnit, Jschlatt, Shubble, Tubbo, Nihachu, Bekyamon, CaptainSparklez, Ranboo, Aimsey**, and others, capturing the original Origins SMP vibe with a modern polish.

**SOME KEY OSMP FEATURES...**

**[** 🖥️ **]** [Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins) ▪ Start a server and jump in fast, plus grab 25% off your first month with code Origins.

**[** 🎒 **]** [Time To Pack It Up](https://dashboard.mrcrayfish.com/mods/backpacked) ▪ Backpacks for days. Haul your stuff around and upgrade them however you like.

**[** 🧱 **]** [Block Party](https://modrinth.com/mod/some-more-blocks) ▪ A massive pile of new blocks so you can build pretty much whatever you’re imagining.

**[** 🌳 **]** [New Lands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) ▪ New places to wander through and familiar spots that feel fresh again.

**[** 🎙️ **]** [Prettier Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amendedicons) ▪ Simple Voice Chat icons, just with a more polished look thanks to Amended Icons.

[![origins banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1449f48133904a4d9b6ac854f2214440af5cd2b.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/origins)
